samples.xml_description:
Implement a 4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier. Clock. Active-low reset. Multiplicand. Multiplier. Product. 4 Extend input signals. The bit position of the multiplier. Extended multiplicand. Extended multiplier. 
ext_a = {{size{1'b0}}, mul_a};
ext_b = {{size{1'b0}}, mul_b};
 Generate partial products. Bit position of the multiplier. Partial product. Extended multiplicand. Extended multiplier. 
if (ext_b[i] == 1'b1)
partial = ext_a << i;
else
partial = 'd0;
 Generate partial product. Bit position of the multiplier. The delay cycle. Partial product. 
if (i == j)
partial = partial_reg[i];
else if (i < j)
partial = partial_reg[i] + partial_reg[i+(size-j)];
else
partial = 'd0;
 Calculate the final product. Final product. 
if (~rst_n)
out = 'd0;
else
out = reg_sum[size];
 size parameter 2*size parameter Partial product registers. Sum registers. Loop index. Delay cycle. Extended multiplicand. Extended multiplier. Partial product. Final product. Sum. Carry.
